packet_loss.description: TCP throughput degradation from packet loss (Mathis formula approximation)

jitter_ms.description: Latency addition from jitter on storage protocols

bandwidth_throttle.description: If bandwidth is throttled, throughput is capped at throttle_pct of theoretical max

steal_time.description: VM CPU steal time degrades storage performance

reservation_overhead.description: CPU reserved for OS/storage controller reduces available CPU for workloads

pressure.description: Memory pressure forcing swap degrades performance dramatically
pressure.note: If RAM is insufficient for working set, apply 0.30x multiplier to IOPS

queue_depth_saturation.description: When queue depth exceeds controller capacity, latency increases non-linearly
queue_depth_saturation.note: If expected queue depth > 128, apply 3.5x latency penalty

write_back_policy.description: Write-through mode reduces write performance by ~40% vs write-back

raid_rebuild_contention.description: Active RAID rebuild consumes 20-30% of I/O bandwidth

tail_latency.description: p99 latency is typically 3-8x p50 latency under load

veeam.description: Veeam proxy processing overhead reduces effective throughput

concurrent_jobs_scaling.description: Each additional concurrent job reduces per-job throughput
